---
title: Roadmap
---

Open work is maintained alongside each submodule's documentation. Completed
items are removed from these pages.

## Module roadmaps

| Area | Scope | Roadmap |
|---|---|---|
| `q.bt` | Backtesting | [View roadmap](bt/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.data` | Data access and datasets | [View roadmap](data/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.env` | Environment configuration | [View roadmap](env/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.calendar` | Exchange sessions and market time | [View roadmap](calendar/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.indicator` | Single-instrument market measurements | [View roadmap](indicator/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.cross_section` | Cross-sectional characteristics | [View roadmap](cross_section/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.label` | Future-aware target construction | [View roadmap](label/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.dataset` | Aligned ML datasets and split schemes | [View roadmap](dataset/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.transform` | Fitted model-input transformations | [View roadmap](transform/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.signal` | Investment intent and rule outputs | [View roadmap](signal/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.model` | Model utilities and selection | [View roadmap](model/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.plot` | Plotting and reports | [View roadmap](plot/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.portfolio` | Portfolio analysis | [View roadmap](portfolio/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.stats` | Return-stream, risk, and factor statistics | [View roadmap](stats/roadmap.qmd) |
| `q.utils` | Shared utilities | [View roadmap](utils/roadmap.qmd) |

## Project-wide work

- [ ] Package scaffolding (`pyproject.toml`, CI, tests) — `pyproject.toml` and
  `tests/` are in place; CI (GitHub Actions or similar) is still missing
- [ ] `q.load_settings("settings.json")` — project-level defaults (rolling
  window, annualization, theme) that override library defaults without
  cluttering call sites

## Ideas

Exploratory candidates that fit qrt's unified quant-research API. These are
not yet committed roadmap items. Candidates with a clear existing owner live
on that module's roadmap; the items below would introduce or span namespaces.

- [ ] `q.config` — layer defaults, JSON/TOML files, `.env` values, and explicit
  overrides with validation
- [ ] `q.calendar` — exchange calendars, sessions, holidays, market hours, and
  timestamp alignment using `exchange-calendars`
- [ ] `q.optimize` — mean-variance, risk-parity, minimum-variance, and constrained
  portfolio optimization
- [ ] `q.experiment` — record parameters, dataset fingerprints, random seeds,
  metrics, and artifacts for reproducible research
- [ ] `q.validate` — validate OHLCV/trade schemas, timestamps, missing sessions,
  suspicious returns, and look-ahead risks
- [ ] `q.execution` — shared fee, slippage, spread, order-sizing, and fill models
  for backtests
- [ ] `q.signal` — signal normalization, ranking, neutralization, decay,
  turnover, and information-coefficient analysis

## Inspiration

Libraries we take inspiration from (and in some cases wrap or borrow ideas from):

| Library | What we borrow |
|---|---|
| [tulipy](https://tulipindicators.org/) | technical indicators |
| [feature-engine](https://feature-engine.trainindata.com/en/latest/) | feature engineering |
| [quantstats](https://github.com/ranaroussi/quantstats) | tearsheets, return-stream metrics |
| [pyfolio-reloaded](https://github.com/stefan-jansen/pyfolio-reloaded) | portfolio/performance analysis |
| [alphalens-reloaded](https://github.com/stefan-jansen/alphalens-reloaded) | alpha-factor evaluation |
| [empyrical-reloaded](https://github.com/stefan-jansen/empyrical-reloaded) | risk/performance statistics |
| [tsfresh](https://github.com/blue-yonder/tsfresh) | automated time-series feature extraction |
| [skfolio](https://github.com/skfolio/skfolio) | sklearn-style portfolio optimization |
| [mlfinlab](https://github.com/hudson-and-thames/mlfinlab) | purged CV, embargo, financial ML (López de Prado) |
| [pandas-ta](https://github.com/twopirllc/pandas-ta) | technical indicators |
| [pandas-ta-classic](https://github.com/xgboosted/pandas-ta-classic) | maintained fork of pandas-ta indicators |
| [Riskfolio-Lib](https://github.com/dcajasn/Riskfolio-Lib) | portfolio optimization & risk measures |
| [qlib](https://github.com/microsoft/qlib) | end-to-end quant ML platform design |
| [pytorch-forecasting](https://github.com/sktime/pytorch-forecasting) | PyTorch time-series model wrappers |
| [sktime](https://github.com/sktime/sktime) | unified time-series API design |
| [alphatools](https://github.com/marketneutral/alphatools) | alpha research & factor tooling on a securities master |
| [PyStats](https://github.com/marcizhu/PyStats) | statistical distribution functions (pdf/cdf/quantile/sampling) |
